scripts.compact: compact compile src/nuauth-stamp.compact src/managed/nuauth-stamp && node scripts/strip-managed-sourcemaps.mjs src/managed/nuauth-stamp
scripts.build: rm -rf dist && tsc --project tsconfig.build.json && cp -R src/managed dist/managed && cp src/*.compact dist/ && node scripts/strip-managed-sourcemaps.mjs dist/managed/nuauth-stamp
